what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for an image asset in the design-source channel, holding YAML metadata and a short provenance note for company-info/p-06.jpg.
observations: YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime type, name, width/height, source, author_session, created, and empty links
Body line labels the file as 'SOURCE design ground-truth — company-info/p-06.jpg'
The image dimensions w and h are both 0
standouts: Width and height are 0 for an image record
Empty links array leaves the asset unconnected in the ledger
Blob reference is the only content-addressed pointer to the actual image
concerns: Image dimensions are reported as 0, which may indicate missing or unprocessed metadata
No descriptive caption, alt text, or visual summary is provided
Empty links array means relationships to other assets are not recorded
notes: A sparse ledger entry for a design-source JPEG that records provenance but lacks dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height set to 0?
What visual content does company-info/p-06.jpg contain?
Which other files or pages is this image intended to ground-truth?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is a design ground-truth source record for an image; the file does exactly that, though its dimensional metadata is incomplete.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to establish a canonical, traceable ledger record for a specific design-source image used as ground truth.
contribution: Provides a stable metadata record that links a named design-source image path to its blob, mime type, author session, and creation timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata record for the JPEG image company-info/p-06 in the design-source channel, including a blob reference, mime type, author session, and creation timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog and preserve provenance for a design-source ground-truth image asset.
